recommendations: Hemoglobin is low — consider evaluation for anemia. Check ferritin, iron studies, vitamin B12, folate, and review for blood loss.
Platelet count is low — assess for bleeding risk and consider hematology consult if significantly low.
Serum creatinine is elevated — consider assessing renal function and calculating eGFR; repeat and correlate clinically.
Total cholesterol >200 mg/dL — evaluate cardiovascular risk and consider lifestyle changes / lipid profile management.
This automated analysis is informational only. Discuss the report with a qualified healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment.
